acceptance_evidence.criterion: Release summary states exactly what benchmark supports.

claim_boundary: CPU-only integration report over tracked scenario_cert.v1 summary and release claim matrix. It does not run a benchmark campaign, publish a release, submit compute, or promote blocked/stress-only rows as benchmark evidence.
